description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a perimeter of potted plants, creating a lush green border. The structure features a flat roof with a light brown trim and a predominantly white and dark gray facade. Large windows are arranged asymmetrically, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The front entrance is recessed and partially sheltered, with a paved patio area and minimalistic landscaping. The building's clean lines and geometric forms emphasize its modern architectural style. The overall design is compact, functional, and visually striking, suitable for an urban residential setting.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, white and dark gray exterior, and surrounded by potted plants. Features large asymmetrical windows and a recessed front entrance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, patio, and large windows with potted plants lining the perimeter.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long white wall, smaller windows, and continuous plant border.
description_view_2: Rear view with a flat roof, minimal windows, and dense plant arrangement along the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a mix of dark and light wall sections, smaller windows, and the plant border.
